title: Convention judgment call (delegation trap)
hypothesis: The trap scenario: per Devin Fusion, delegating judgment loses quality. The fusion coordinator should keep the convention decision itself; if it delegates the whole task, expect the wrong convention or sloppy conversion.
prompt: Error handling across the CLI commands in src/commands is inconsistent. Unify all commands to the codebase's prevailing error-handling convention. Do not change observable behavior or exit codes, and `npm test` must still pass.
